ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "price" REAL /* Stock price at the time of entry */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "market_center" TEXT /* Market center where the trade occurred */,
  "bid" REAL /* Current bid price for the stock */,
  "ask" REAL /* Current ask price for the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_market_center FOREIGN KEY ("market_center") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stock details were updated */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the exchange */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the exchange details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the trade */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade occurred */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., open, filled, canceled) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the trading activity was updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_activity_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trend */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the trend analysis was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical analysis entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time of the analysis */,
  "indicator" TEXT /* Type of technical indicator (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the technical analysis */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the technical analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the technical analysis was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_analysis_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "news_time" TEXT /* Time when the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the news on the stock price (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the news source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the news item was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)
